◎简　　介  

　　A wealthy man is killed during a cow boy event. About a year later, his young widow meets by chance and falls in love with the man that organized the event where her husband was killed. She introduces him to her son and sister and everything seems perfect. After they wed, money issues begin to create tensions...@www.lightyear.club
